GUNSLINGER.title: The Gunslinger
GUNSLINGER.description: A modern gunslinger climbing the Spire to fulfill a personal wish.
GUNSLINGER.cardsModifierDescription: Gunslinger cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
GUNSLINGER.aromaPrinciple: [sine]The click of a cylinder. The weight of a wish.[/sine]
GUNSLINGER.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet. The wish isn't finished.
